title: BlockPixel Extend: CTM
description: Enables some connected texture features for BlockPixel, including connected glass and some natural blocks!
body:
# Connected Textures for BlockPixel
This pack enables some connected texture features for the resourcepack [BlockPixel](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/blockpixel-texture/).  
OptifineHD or [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) is **Required** for this pack to work.

- Connections between the same type of glass become smooth.
- Grass, sand, and gravel now have pixelated gradients between them.



# About BlockPixel Extend Project
BlockPixel Extend is a resourcepack project that extends the original BlockPixel, launched by GrakePCH. This project is authorized by the author of BlockPixel, [Jakob.zero](https://twitter.com/Jakob_zero). The project focuses on improving the completeness of BlockPixel to support Mods and Optifine custom textures. The resourcepacks of the project are considered add-ons or DLCs, which require the original BlockPixel pack loaded to work properly. In the UI of Minecraft resourcepack settings, BlockPixel Extend packs should be placed above the original BlockPixel pack in the loading list.
